category_sources: Official GitHub repository about text says it converts text files to and from Unix, Windows, and DOS.
source_facts.description says tofrodos converts DOS UNIX text files.
display_name_sources: Official repository name is ChristopherHeng/tofrodos and About text uses tofrodos.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best available documentation surface for this small conversion utility.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ChristopherHeng/tofrodos, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official repository About text says it converts text files to and from Unix, Windows, and DOS.
